figures.caption: Table 1: Quantitative comparison with state-of-the-art methods on NAVSIM v1 NAVTEST. C: Camera, L: LiDAR. WM: World Model. Best results are in bold, second best are underlined.

Figure 2: Overview of CoPhy. Multi-modal data are encoded into BEV state B0. (a) The cognitive prior distillation module aligns B0 with VLM-derived cognitive feature C via cross-modal distillation, and injects C into the trajectory refiner to produce cognitively-aware candidates. (b) The physical world model rollout module auto-regressively rolls out future BEV states over K steps as a physical sandbox; trajectories are then scored along cognitive and physical axes via hierarchical selection. (c) The cognitive-physical policy optimization optimizes the policy with dual cognitive-physical rewards.
